products.product_description: Customers find the perfume's presentation beautiful and appreciate its quality, with one noting it's better than the overrated gold edition. The longevity receives mixed feedback - while some say it lasts 9 hours on skin, others report it only lasts 3.4 seconds. Moreover, the scent receives mixed reactions, with some saying it smells wonderful while others note it smells too much like alcohol. Additionally, opinions on value are divided between those who find it well worth the price and those who consider it a waste of money. The perfume's projection and alcohol content also get mixed reviews, with some praising the projection while others report no projection at all, and some describing it as just alcohol.

products.product_title: Al Haramain Fragrance Discovery Set for Men & Women ? 4?10ml Each, (Amber Oud Gold Edition + L'aventure + Azlan Oud Amber Edition + Blanche)
products.product_description: Customers find the fragrance amazing, with one noting its smoky undertones, and they consider it a great cologne that draws compliments and stands out as a manly scent. Moreover, the fragrance offers good value for money without sacrificing quality, and customers appreciate its great projection. However, the longevity receives mixed feedback - while some say it lasts all day, others find it doesn't last as long as expected. The citrus tones are also mixed, with several customers describing it as very citrusy.
